TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == Ci-cya-li ŚźČšĹ≥Śą© Ci-cya-li "Lu-an-ta a kamu, Kigali,(ci.…°…ĎŐĀ.…ĺi))nu Lu-an-ta a angangan nu tukay atu satabakiay a tukuy, zuma kitizaan a lala' macapi tu kaecapuan nuyni a kanatal. makay 1962 a mihcaan uyni sateked nu Lu-an-ta, Ci-cya-li nu Lu-an-ta a cen-ce, keyzay atu lalangawan a kasaupu, imahini uyza angangan nuyni a saculilan nu kanatal. mala angangan nuyni a kanatal, ŚźČšĹ≥Śą©(ÁõßŚģČťĀĒŤ™ě:Kigali,(ci.…°…ĎŐĀ.…ĺi)) , nilaculan Ci-cya-li u Cong-tung nu Lu-an-ta atu zuma a cung-ng cen-bu a pikawawan atu sakakaay akitizaan. Ci-cya-li a tukay itini i labu a kuwan nu Ci-cya-li, 2006 a mihca 1 a bulad hamin mikawaway misumad tu sakuwan a tukay misatabaki tu liwliw nu Ci-cya-li katukuh hamin hekal nu sakuwan nu Ci-cya-li. hamin nu hekal 730 pin-bang kung-li, zuma nu tukayay a kakitizaan macalap ku 70%. 70%. likisi ś≠∑ŚŹ≤ ayw nu 8000 a mihcaan katukuh tu 3000 a mihcaan, Te-wa a binacadan nu ayzaay a Lu-an-ta. Te-wa a binacadan nu Pi-ke-mi a tademawan, uyni a tademawan itawya u miadupay u ala ku nikauzip. ayaw nu 700 a mihcaan katukuh 1500 a mihcaan, pasu ayzaay a Bu-tu a binacadan atu pasu Tu-si a binacadanay a Pan-tu a tademaw malingatu i ayzay a Lu-an-ta tiza manaeng katuh ayza. namalingatu katukuh ayza, Pan-tu micumud tu tu malukay a tukay, uyaanay a kilakilangan maletek mapatades mala sakalukan a lala'. Ci-cya-li u kasaupuan nu keyzey ku Lu-an-ta, Lu-an-ta a labu nu kanatal u satabakiay a tukuy nu misiwbayay. angangan a nilatul sa u midapay a kawaw, kitakit a gingku u piasip tu midapay a kawaw macalap tu 2014 a mihcaan GDP a 53%. satabakiay u mangelu'ay a kawaw u nisalunguc nilacul nikalukan nibutingan atu kilang a kawaw, u calap tu mangeluay a kawaw 24%, 2012 a mihcaan pulung a niasipan, sakaluk a lala' u calap tu tukay a ahebal ikaka tu 60%. 2014ŚĻīGDPÁöĄ53%. 60%šĽ•šłä. 2014 a mihcaan, Ci-cya-li a kusian a ngangayaw pasu miculu'ay tu zaylyaw patayza labu nu kanatal talakaw ku nipalawpes tu kalisiw, saaca azaaw ku nisanga'an atu nayi' ku tatanengan tu tademaw. Ci-cya-li micapi tu Si-s a piba'tuan a kitizaan, Si-s taneng misanga' tu si atu cin. mipatadas tu si atu cin tini i saamisan nu cacay a bataan a kung-li nu Rutongo, mipatadas tu si itini Nyakabingo, laed tu Ci-cya-li pakala tu cacay a bataan a kung-li. yadah ku ba'tu a kakelul han patahkal patayzi i zumaan a kanatal amisanga' mimelmel, nika itawya iza ku kapahay a kikay tu sapimelmel tu ba'tu, pasu i Ci-cya-li tu saamisan a Ka-lu-lu-ma pisanga'an mimelmel a kusi, i 1980 a ziday patizeng, 2019 a mihcaan tu nisulitan taneng izaw ku 1,800 kung-tun "1,800, ku tanayu' kung-tu, 2000 ku apuyu' kung-tun" ku tatenga'ay a si. duduc Lu-an-ta 2012 a mihcaan tu pikingsa tu tademaw, Ci-cya-li a tademaw izaw ku 1,132,686 ku tademaw, zuma 859,332 ku tademaw muenengay i tukuy a kitizaan. Ci-cya-li a tukay nu Lu-an-ta lima a sakuwan sakawawan nu kasacacay, uyza cacay aca a "tukay" u sakuwan pulung iza ku tulu a kitizaan mikawaw, pasazuma tu kitizaan nu Ka-sa-pow "Gasabo District", kitizaan nu Ci-ku-low "Kicukiro District" atu kitizaan nu Ni-ya-lu "Nyarugenge District". 2006 a m ihcaan pikawawan ayaw nu pisumad tu Ci-cya-li a niyazu' "Ci-cya-li", mamin misumad papulung pacumud labu nu Ci-cya-li. mikuwan tu saykay u nipili'an nu binawlan a sakaput mikawaway a wi-yen ku sitatungusay, mikawaway a wi-yen u kingciw atu mitayliay tu kinciw tatusa, tatulu mapulung situngus mikawaw tu seyhu. (Gasabo District),ŚüļŚļęŚüļÁĺÖŚćÄ(Kicukiro District)ŚíĆŚįľšļěť≠ĮŚ≤°ŚćÄ(Nyarugenge District).2006 (Kigali-Rural Province), . malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == ¶i- ¶ja-r~…ĺi *** ¶i- ¶ja-r~…ĺi "r~…ĺu-an-ta a kamu, kigar~…ĺi,( ¶i.***.…ĺi))nu r~…ĺu-an-ta a aŇčaŇčan nu tukaj atu satabakiaj a tukuj, zuma kitizaan a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° ma ¶api tu ka…ô ¶apuan nujni a kanatar~…ĺ. makaj **** a mińß ¶aan ujni sat…ôk…ôd nu r~…ĺu-an-ta, ¶i- ¶ja-r~…ĺi nu r~…ĺu-an-ta a ¶…ôn- ¶…ô, k…ôzaj atu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan a kasaupu, imańßini ujza aŇčaŇčan nujni a sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan nu kanatar~…ĺ. mar~…ĺa aŇčaŇčan nujni a kanatar~…ĺ, ***(****:kigar~…ĺi,( ¶i.***.…ĺi)) , nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan ¶i- ¶ja-r~…ĺi u ¶oŇč-tuŇč nu r~…ĺu-an-ta atu zuma a ¶uŇč-Ňč ¶…ôn-bu a pikawawan atu sakakaaj akitizaan. ¶i- ¶ja-r~…ĺi a tukaj itini i r~…ĺabu a kuwan nu ¶i- ¶ja-r~…ĺi, **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ńßamin mikawawaj misumad tu sakuwan a tukaj misatabaki tu r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw nu ¶i- ¶ja-r~…ĺi katukuńß ńßamin ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu sakuwan nu ¶i- ¶ja-r~…ĺi. ńßamin nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ *** pin-baŇč kuŇč-r~…ĺi, zuma nu tukajaj a kakitizaan ma ¶ar~…ĺap ku **%. **%. r~…ĺikisi ** ajw nu **** a mińß ¶aan katukuńß tu **** a mińß ¶aan, t…ô-wa a bina ¶adan nu ajzaaj a r~…ĺu-an-ta. t…ô-wa a bina ¶adan nu pi-k…ô-mi a tad…ômawan, ujni a tad…ômawan itawja u miadupaj u ar~…ĺa ku nikauzip. ajaw nu *** a mińß ¶aan katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan, pasu ajzaaj a bu-tu a bina ¶adan atu pasu tu-si a bina ¶adanaj a pan-tu a tad…ômaw mar~…ĺiŇčatu i ajzaj a r~…ĺu-an-ta tiza mana…ôŇč katuńß ajza. namar~…ĺiŇčatu katukuńß ajza, pan-tu mi ¶umud tu tu mar~…ĺukaj a tukaj, ujaanaj a kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan mar~…ĺ…ôt…ôk mapatad…ôs mar~…ĺa sakar~…ĺukan a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °. ¶i- ¶ja-r~…ĺi u kasaupuan nu k…ôz…ô ku r~…ĺu-an-ta, r~…ĺu-an-ta a r~…ĺabu nu kanatar~…ĺ u satabakiaj a tukuj nu misiwbajaj. aŇčaŇčan a nir~…ĺatur~…ĺ sa u midapaj a kawaw, kitakit a giŇčku u piasip tu midapaj a kawaw ma ¶ar~…ĺap tu **** a mińß ¶aan gdp a **%. satabakiaj u maŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ °aj a kawaw u nisar~…ĺuŇču ¶ nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ nikar~…ĺukan nibutiŇčan atu kir~…ĺaŇč a kawaw, u ¶ar~…ĺap tu maŇč…ôr~…ĺuaj a kawaw **%, **** a mińß ¶aan pur~…ĺuŇč a niasipan, sakar~…ĺuk a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° u ¶ar~…ĺap tu tukaj a ańß…ôbar~…ĺ ikaka tu **%. *****gdp***%. **%**. **** a mińß ¶aan, ¶i- ¶ja-r~…ĺi a kusian a ŇčaŇčajaw pasu mi ¶ur~…ĺu Ē~ °aj tu zajr~…ĺjaw patajza r~…ĺabu nu kanatar~…ĺ tar~…ĺakaw ku nipar~…ĺawp…ôs tu kar~…ĺisiw, saa ¶a azaaw ku nisaŇča Ē~ °an atu naji Ē~ ° ku tatan…ôŇčan tu tad…ômaw. ¶i- ¶ja-r~…ĺi mi ¶api tu si-s a piba Ē~ °tuan a kitizaan, si-s tan…ôŇč misaŇča Ē~ ° tu si atu ¶in. mipatadas tu si atu ¶in tini i saamisan nu ¶a ¶aj a bataan a kuŇč-r~…ĺi nu *utoŇčo, mipatadas tu si itini njakabiŇčo, r~…ĺa…ôd tu ¶i- ¶ja-r~…ĺi pakar~…ĺa tu ¶a ¶aj a bataan a kuŇč-r~…ĺi. jadańß ku ba Ē~ °tu a kak…ôr~…ĺur~…ĺ ńßan patańßkar~…ĺ patajzi i zumaan a kanatar~…ĺ amisaŇča Ē~ ° mim…ôr~…ĺm…ôr~…ĺ, nika itawja iza ku kapańßaj a kikaj tu sapim…ôr~…ĺm…ôr~…ĺ tu ba Ē~ °tu, pasu i ¶i- ¶ja-r~…ĺi tu saamisan a ka-r~…ĺu-r~…ĺu-ma pisaŇča Ē~ °an mim…ôr~…ĺm…ôr~…ĺ a kusi, i **** a zidaj patiz…ôŇč, **** a mińß ¶aan tu nisur~…ĺitan tan…ôŇč izaw ku *,*** kuŇč-tun "*,***, ku tanaju Ē~ ° kuŇč-tu, **** ku apuju Ē~ ° kuŇč-tun" ku tat…ôŇča Ē~ °aj a si. dudu ¶ r~…ĺu-an-ta **** a mińß ¶aan tu pikiŇčsa tu tad…ômaw, ¶i- ¶ja-r~…ĺi a tad…ômaw izaw ku *,***,*** ku tad…ômaw, zuma ***,*** ku tad…ômaw mu…ôn…ôŇčaj i tukuj a kitizaan. ¶i- ¶ja-r~…ĺi a tukaj nu r~…ĺu-an-ta r~…ĺima a sakuwan sakawawan nu kasa ¶a ¶aj, ujza ¶a ¶aj a ¶a a "tukaj" u sakuwan pur~…ĺuŇč iza ku tur~…ĺu a kitizaan mikawaw, pasazuma tu kitizaan nu ka-sa-pow "gasabo distri ¶t", kitizaan nu ¶i-ku-r~…ĺow "ki ¶ukiro distri ¶t" atu kitizaan nu ni-ja-r~…ĺu "njarug…ôŇč…ô distri ¶t". **** a m ińß ¶aan pikawawan ajaw nu pisumad tu ¶i- ¶ja-r~…ĺi a nijazu Ē~ ° " ¶i- ¶ja-r~…ĺi", mamin misumad papur~…ĺuŇč pa ¶umud r~…ĺabu nu ¶i- ¶ja-r~…ĺi. mikuwan tu sajkaj u nipir~…ĺi Ē~ °an nu binawr~…ĺan a sakaput mikawawaj a wi-j…ôn ku sitatuŇčusaj, mikawawaj a wi-j…ôn u kiŇč ¶iw atu mitajr~…ĺiaj tu kin ¶iw tatusa, tatur~…ĺu mapur~…ĺuŇč situŇčus mikawaw tu s…ôńßu. (gasabo distri ¶t),*****(ki ¶ukiro distri ¶t)******(njarug…ôŇč…ô distri ¶t).**** (kigar~…ĺi-*urar~…ĺ pro*in ¶…ô), . mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
S.FORM: == kakiliman == Ci-cya-li ŚźČšĹ≥Śą© Ci-cya-li "Lu-an-ta a kamu, Kigali,(ci.…°…ĎŐĀ.…ĺi))nu Lu-an-ta a angangan nu tukay atu satabakiay a tukuy, zuma kitizaan a lala' macapi tu kaecapuan nuyni a kanatal. makay 1962 a mihcaan uyni sateked nu Lu-an-ta, Ci-cya-li nu Lu-an-ta a cen-ce, keyzay atu lalangawan a kasaupu, imahini uyza angangan nuyni a saculilan nu kanatal. mala angangan nuyni a kanatal, ŚźČšĹ≥Śą©(ÁõßŚģČťĀĒŤ™ě:Kigali,(ci.…°…ĎŐĀ.…ĺi)) , nilaculan Ci-cya-li u Cong-tung nu Lu-an-ta atu zuma a cung-ng cen-bu a pikawawan atu sakakaay akitizaan. Ci-cya-li a tukay itini i labu a kuwan nu Ci-cya-li, 2006 a mihca 1 a bulad hamin mikawaway misumad tu sakuwan a tukay misatabaki tu liwliw nu Ci-cya-li katukuh hamin hekal nu sakuwan nu Ci-cya-li. hamin nu hekal 730 pin-bang kung-li, zuma nu tukayay a kakitizaan macalap ku 70%. 70%. likisi ś≠∑ŚŹ≤ ayw nu 8000 a mihcaan katukuh tu 3000 a mihcaan, Te-wa a binacadan nu ayzaay a Lu-an-ta. Te-wa a binacadan nu Pi-ke-mi a tademawan, uyni a tademawan itawya u miadupay u ala ku nikauzip. ayaw nu 700 a mihcaan katukuh 1500 a mihcaan, pasu ayzaay a Bu-tu a binacadan atu pasu Tu-si a binacadanay a Pan-tu a tademaw malingatu i ayzay a Lu-an-ta tiza manaeng katuh ayza. namalingatu katukuh ayza, Pan-tu micumud tu tu malukay a tukay, uyaanay a kilakilangan maletek mapatades mala sakalukan a lala'. Ci-cya-li u kasaupuan nu keyzey ku Lu-an-ta, Lu-an-ta a labu nu kanatal u satabakiay a tukuy nu misiwbayay. angangan a nilatul sa u midapay a kawaw, kitakit a gingku u piasip tu midapay a kawaw macalap tu 2014 a mihcaan GDP a 53%. satabakiay u mangelu'ay a kawaw u nisalunguc nilacul nikalukan nibutingan atu kilang a kawaw, u calap tu mangeluay a kawaw 24%, 2012 a mihcaan pulung a niasipan, sakaluk a lala' u calap tu tukay a ahebal ikaka tu 60%. 2014ŚĻīGDPÁöĄ53%. 60%šĽ•šłä. 2014 a mihcaan, Ci-cya-li a kusian a ngangayaw pasu miculu'ay tu zaylyaw patayza labu nu kanatal talakaw ku nipalawpes tu kalisiw, saaca azaaw ku nisanga'an atu nayi' ku tatanengan tu tademaw. Ci-cya-li micapi tu Si-s a piba'tuan a kitizaan, Si-s taneng misanga' tu si atu cin. mipatadas tu si atu cin tini i saamisan nu cacay a bataan a kung-li nu Rutongo, mipatadas tu si itini Nyakabingo, laed tu Ci-cya-li pakala tu cacay a bataan a kung-li. yadah ku ba'tu a kakelul han patahkal patayzi i zumaan a kanatal amisanga' mimelmel, nika itawya iza ku kapahay a kikay tu sapimelmel tu ba'tu, pasu i Ci-cya-li tu saamisan a Ka-lu-lu-ma pisanga'an mimelmel a kusi, i 1980 a ziday patizeng, 2019 a mihcaan tu nisulitan taneng izaw ku 1,800 kung-tun "1,800, ku tanayu' kung-tu, 2000 ku apuyu' kung-tun" ku tatenga'ay a si. duduc Lu-an-ta 2012 a mihcaan tu pikingsa tu tademaw, Ci-cya-li a tademaw izaw ku 1,132,686 ku tademaw, zuma 859,332 ku tademaw muenengay i tukuy a kitizaan. Ci-cya-li a tukay nu Lu-an-ta lima a sakuwan sakawawan nu kasacacay, uyza cacay aca a "tukay" u sakuwan pulung iza ku tulu a kitizaan mikawaw, pasazuma tu kitizaan nu Ka-sa-pow "Gasabo District", kitizaan nu Ci-ku-low "Kicukiro District" atu kitizaan nu Ni-ya-lu "Nyarugenge District". 2006 a m ihcaan pikawawan ayaw nu pisumad tu Ci-cya-li a niyazu' "Ci-cya-li", mamin misumad papulung pacumud labu nu Ci-cya-li. mikuwan tu saykay u nipili'an nu binawlan a sakaput mikawaway a wi-yen ku sitatungusay, mikawaway a wi-yen u kingciw atu mitayliay tu kinciw tatusa, tatulu mapulung situngus mikawaw tu seyhu. (Gasabo District),ŚüļŚļęŚüļÁĺÖŚćÄ(Kicukiro District)ŚíĆŚįľšļěť≠ĮŚ≤°ŚćÄ(Nyarugenge District).2006 (Kigali-Rural Province), . malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan

¶api tu ka…ô ¶apuan nujni a kanatar~…ĺ. makaj **** a mińß ¶aan ujni sat…ôk…ôd nu r~…ĺu-an-ta, ¶i- ¶ja-r~…ĺi nu r~…ĺu-an-ta a ¶…ôn- ¶…ô, k…ôzaj atu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan a kasaupu, imańßini ujza aŇčaŇčan *** a mińß ¶aan katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan, pasu ajzaaj a bu-tu a bina ¶adan atu pasu tu-si a bina ¶adanaj a pan-tu a tad…ômaw mar~…ĺiŇčatu i ajzaj a r~…ĺu-an-ta tiza mana…ôŇč katuńß ajza. kikaj tu sapim…ôr~…ĺm…ôr~…ĺ tu ba Ē~ °tu, pasu i ¶i- ¶ja-r~…ĺi tu saamisan a ka-r~…ĺu-r~…ĺu-ma pisaŇča Ē~ °an mim…ôr~…ĺm…ôr~…ĺ a kusi, i **** a zidaj patiz…ôŇč, **** a mińß ¶aan tu nisur~…ĺitan tan…ôŇč izaw ku *,*** kuŇč-tun "*,***, ku tanaju Ē~ ° kuŇč-tu, **** ku apuju Ē~ ° kuŇč-tun" ku tat…ôŇča Ē~ °aj a si. dudu ¶ r~…ĺu-an-ta **** a mińß ¶aan tu pikiŇčsa tu tad…ômaw, ¶i- ¶ja-r~…ĺi a tad…ômaw izaw ku *,***,*** ku tad…ômaw, zuma ***,*** ku tad…ômaw mu…ôn…ôŇčaj i tukuj a kitizaan. ¶i- ¶ja-r~…ĺi a tukaj nu r~…ĺu-an-ta r~…ĺima a sakuwan sakawawan nu kasa ¶a ¶aj, ujza ¶a ¶aj a ¶a a "tukaj" u sakuwan pur~…ĺuŇč iza ku tur~…ĺu a kitizaan mikawaw, pasazuma tu kitizaan nu ka-sa-pow "gasabo distri ¶t", kitizaan nu ¶i-ku-r~…ĺow "ki ¶ukiro distri ¶t" atu kitizaan nu ni-ja-r~…ĺu "njarug…ôŇč…ô distri ¶t". **** a m ińß ¶aan pikawawan ajaw nu pisumad tu ¶i- ¶ja-r~…ĺi a nijazu Ē~ ° " ¶i- ¶ja-r~…ĺi", mamin misumad papur~…ĺuŇč pa ¶umud r~…ĺabu nu ¶i- ¶ja-r~…ĺi. mikuwan tu sajkaj u nipir~…ĺi Ē~ °an nu binawr~…ĺan a sakaput mikawawaj a wi-j…ôn ku sitatuŇčusaj, mikawawaj a wi-j…ôn u kiŇč ¶iw atu mitajr~…ĺiaj tu kin ¶iw tatusa, tatur~…ĺu mapur~…ĺuŇč situŇčus mikawaw tu s…ôńßu. (gasabo distri ¶t),*****(ki ¶ukiro distri ¶t)******(njarug…ôŇč…ô distri ¶t).**** (kigar~…ĺi-*urar~…ĺ pro*in ¶…ô), . mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
